description: A list of medicinal items in Judaeo-Arabic and eastern Arabic numerals. Dating: Ottoman-era, perhaps 18th or 19th century. This shelfmark's full ENA 1984 series are folios from a broader booklet of medicinal recipes and perhaps inventories of ingredients. There are also signs of geomancy castings in a few places throughout ENA 1984.1-7.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
